name: italy-eli-mcp
summary: MCP server for Italian law: federal legislation via Normattiva (Akoma Ntoso / URN:NIR / ELI, point-in-time text), Constitutional Court (Corte Costituzionale) case law from the Court's official open data (ECLI-native), Supreme Court (Corte di Cassazione) case law via the Court's free public SentenzeWeb search, and administrative case law (Consiglio di Stato, C.G.A.R.S., TAR) via the Giustizia Amministrativa portal search, live.
